name: Fidelity Export & Format
description: Export Obsidian notes to high-fidelity HTML and PDF (preserves banner, image captions, float wrap-around, tables, callouts and footnotes). Includes themes, accent picker, live PDF preview, and a splicing mode that lets you insert page breaks anywhere directly from inside Obsidian. PDF requires Python 3 + WeasyPrint + PyMuPDF on desktop; HTML-only works on mobile.
author: simoen
